subcodes.first_line: O servant of Truth! Observe thou the loving-kindness of God, how His loved ones are not forgotten and how He watcheth over the hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق شفقت خداوند را دقت نما که یارانش فراموش نگردند تفقد دلها کند و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Mosaic imagery, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @thankfulness; gratitude
